interactive.text: Provide a concise narrative of the deficiency observed, including location aboard, equipment involved, and conditions noted at time of inspection.
State the grounds for detention including direct safety hazards, environmental risk, or evidence of systematic non-compliance.

visibleText: OFFICIAL PORTAL · DOMAIN: maritime.gov.icm SECURE SESSION · OPERATOR ID: OP-44781 ⚓ Ironclad Maritime Registry Directorate of Vessel Compliance & Safety Form ICM-4 / Rev. 12 Audit Cycle Q3-2024 Vessel Registration Crew Certification Voyage Manifest Compliance Audit Fee Schedule Compliance Audit Filing Home  ›  Inspections  › Compliance Audit NOTICE: All sections marked with red asterisks are mandatory. Submissions are logged under the Maritime Compliance Act §14.2. Detention findings require attachment of supporting evidence within 48 hours of audit closure. § 1 · Audit Identification 01 / 04 Audit Reference No. * Vessel IMO * Inspector Name * Inspection Date * Port State Control * Audit Location (port / berth) Inspection Type * PSC Flag Class ISM Overall Result * Clear Deficiency Detention § 2 · Inspection Findings 02 / 04 Deficiency Code * Severity * Convention Reference Deficiency Description * ISM Non-Conformity Flag as ISM NC MARPOL Violation Flag as MARPOL Follow-up Required Schedule follow-up audit § 3 · Deficiency Records 03 / 04 Detention Reason (required only if result = Detention) Deficiencies Logged Repeat Finding?
